title: KVpop -- Key-Value Cache Compression with Predictive Online Pruning
innovation_summary: KVpop -- Key-Value Cache Compression with Predictive Online Pruning: To address this, we introduce KVpop, which learns a fixed-budget KV eviction policy by directly supervising the keep-or-drop decision.
